items.name: goehou/tabbit-toy
items.full_text: 这是一个基于tabbit的研究包，可以转化成OAI格式出来，同时增加了会员认证功能和一键提取cookie的浏览器拓展，方便快速本地快速使用claude gpt等模型

items.name: nova452/ComfyUI-ConditioningKrea2Rebalance
items.full_text: A conditioning optimizer with per layer weighting that offers IP-Adapter-like features for Krea 2 along with bypassing the built in quality diluation from the trained safety filter and also works as a means to unfilter the model.

items.name: entropykit/entropia
items.full_text: A compiled language for Windows position-independent x86-64 shellcode and Beacon Object Files.

items.name: SolidPondSwell/HWID-Utility
items.full_text: SysID Manager is a lightweight Windows tool for managing hardware identifiers including motherboard serial, MAC address, hard disk serial, CPUID, and machine GUID with one-click operation and automatic backup HWID.

items.name: SolidPondSwell/UmbrellaAssistant-Dota2
items.full_text: Lightweight Dota 2 companion application with movement prediction, ability range visualization, vision status monitoring, last hit assistance, path suggestions, and real-time performance dashboard, umbrella assistant.
